{{Quote|Anyway, we were raided by the ''Natalon Core Bandits''. ''Eight'' of those monsters. Chewie fought like ''mad''.|Han Solo, to [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]|<ref name="AVS">''[[A Valentine Story]]''</ref>}}
The '''Natalon Core Bandits''' were a ruthless group of [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] active during the early years of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="AVS" />

[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] were once raided by eight of the Natalon Core Bandits while carrying a load of [[Barcarian claw salt]]. Though Chewbacca was able to disable three of them, the raiders were able to substantially damage the [[Starship/Legends|ship]], shackle the two [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] in the salvage hold, and destroy the ship's [[Life support/Legends|life support]] relays. Chewbacca broke his wrist to free himself from the [[Binders/Legends|shackles]], repaired the relays, and flew the damaged ship to a [[Space station/Legends|space station]].<ref name="AVS" />
